'''Jonathan Wilkins''' is the current Editor at Large of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, published by [[Titan Magazines]]. He previously served as editor for issues [[Star Wars Insider 107|107]] to [[Star Wars Insider 174|174]], from [[January]] [[2009]] through [[July]] [[2017]]. He was succeeded by [[Will Salmon]].

Wilkins has interviewed many ''[[Star Wars]]'' personalities, including [[Mark Hamill]], [[Stuart Freeborn]], [[Nick Dudman]], [[John Mollo]], [[Roger Christian]], [[Dave Filoni]], and [[Dee Bradley Baker]].
==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back: Special 40th Anniversary Collector's Edition]]'' (2020)
